note: A small PUBLIC subset so you can check you're on track. The full hidden set is larger.

checks.hint: An autopay shows in the eClinicalGPS register as authorized but never lands in the Plaid feed. That is an unpaid autopay.
A second authorized autopay never deposited.
One autopay deposited at $627.55 against a scheduled $685.40 — that is an exception (wrong amount), NOT an unpaid item.
Per-visit autopays are billed through the portal even though no site invoice exists; the two site fees are invoiced.
